title: Men are funnier than women, study claims (2019)
abstract: Ever heard that men are funnier than women, according to a study from 2019? This tool will help you test this claim in your groups and see who takes the cake at cracking the most hilarious jokes!
abstract_zh: 你听过吗？2019年有研究说“男人比女人更搞笑”！这可是个能让你捧腹大笑的工具，快来验证一下谁在群里讲冷笑话最离谱吧！
